info.name: Atlas 3.0 — Nigerian AI Financial Advisor
info.description:
Complete API collection for Atlas 3.0. Set the `base_url` and `token` variables before use.

Base URL: http://localhost:8000/api
All amounts are in kobo (divide by 100 for naira).
All protected routes require: Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

request.description: Returns API status, DB and cache health.
Returns public system settings (USDT rates, etc.).
Create a new Atlas account.
Login and receive JWT tokens.
Get a fresh access token using a refresh token.
Returns the authenticated user's profile.
Verify PIN. Returns a short-lived confirm token for sensitive actions.
Invalidates the current session token.
Invalidates all sessions for this user.
